about.title: About SikaPay
about.subtitle: SikaPay is your trusted gateway between the world of cryptocurrencies and Mobile Money in West Africa.
about.missionP1: At SikaPay, we believe everyone should have access to the benefits of decentralized finance. Our mission is to simplify conversion between cryptocurrencies and Mobile Money, offering a fast, secure, and accessible solution for all users in West Africa.
about.missionP2: Whether you want to convert your USDT, USDC, or other stablecoins to CFA francs (XOF), or buy cryptocurrencies with your Mobile Money, SikaPay supports you every step of the way.

features.noKycDesc: No identity verification required. Fast and anonymous conversion for your privacy.
features.speedDesc: Transactions processed in minutes. Receive your money on Mobile Money without delay.
features.securityDesc: Advanced security protocols to protect your transactions and personal data.
features.multiChainDesc: Support for 9 networks: Base, BSC, Ethereum, Arbitrum, Optimism, Polygon, Solana, Avalanche, and Lisk.
features.accessibilityDesc: Simple and intuitive interface, designed for all users, beginners and experts alike.
features.supportDesc: Our team is available at all times to assist you with your transactions.

about.offrampDesc: Convert your cryptocurrencies to XOF and receive money directly to your Mobile Money account (Orange Money, MTN Mobile Money, Wave, etc.).
about.onrampDesc: Buy cryptocurrencies with your Mobile Money. Pay in XOF and receive tokens directly in your blockchain wallet.
about.countriesSubtitle: SikaPay is available in several West African countries using the CFA franc (XOF).
about.ctaSubtitle: Make your first transaction in minutes.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to your questions about SikaPay and our crypto/Mobile Money conversion services.

items.a: SikaPay is a conversion platform between cryptocurrencies and Mobile Money. It allows West African users to convert their crypto (USDT, USDC, etc.) to CFA francs (XOF) directly to their Mobile Money, and vice versa.

items.q: How does Off-Ramp (Crypto → Mobile Money) work?
items.a: To convert your crypto to XOF: 1) Select the token and blockchain network, 2) Enter the amount to convert, 3) Enter your Mobile Money number, 4) Send your crypto to the provided address, 5) Receive your XOF on your Mobile Money within minutes.

items.q: How does On-Ramp (Mobile Money → Crypto) work?
items.a: To buy crypto with your Mobile Money: 1) Select the desired token and network, 2) Enter the amount in XOF to convert, 3) Enter your blockchain wallet address, 4) Make the Mobile Money payment, 5) Receive your crypto in your wallet.

items.q: Do I need to create an account or do KYC verification?
items.a: No, SikaPay works without registration or identity verification (KYC). You can make transactions anonymously and quickly, preserving your privacy.

items.q: What tokens and networks are supported?
items.a: SikaPay supports USDT and USDC stablecoins on 9 blockchain networks: Base, BSC (BNB Smart Chain), Ethereum, Arbitrum, Optimism, Polygon, Solana, Avalanche, and Lisk. More tokens and networks may be added in the future.

items.q: What Mobile Money operators are accepted?
items.a: We support the major Mobile Money operators in West Africa: Orange Money, MTN Mobile Money, Wave, Moov Money, and Free Money. Availability may vary by country.

items.q: In which countries is SikaPay available?
items.a: SikaPay is available in WAEMU zone countries using the CFA franc (XOF): Senegal, Mali, Burkina Faso, Ivory Coast, Togo, and Benin.
Fees are included in the displayed exchange rate. You see exactly how much you will receive before confirming your transaction. No hidden fees are applied.

items.q: How long does a transaction take?
items.a: Most transactions are processed within minutes. The exact time depends on the blockchain network used and Mobile Money payment confirmation. Typically, expect between 5 and 30 minutes.

items.q: What is the minimum/maximum amount per transaction?
items.a: The minimum amount is generally 5 USD (approximately 3,000 XOF). The maximum may vary based on your Mobile Money operator's limits and SikaPay policies. Contact our support for large amounts.

items.q: What if my transaction is pending?
items.a: If your transaction remains pending for more than 30 minutes, first verify that you sent funds to the correct address on the right network. Then contact our support with your transaction number for assistance.
Our support team is available 24/7. You can reach us via WhatsApp, Telegram, or email. Contact details are available on our website.
